description_long: This is a modern HP laptop with a black chassis and a vibrant green backlit keyboard. The screen is open and displays a promotional image featuring a person and Intel branding, with additional informational placards attached around the display and keyboard area. The HP logo, in green, is prominently centered on the back of the display lid. The laptop's palm rest area features several stickers, including an Intel Core i5 badge and a rectangular sticker with technical details. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no visible numeric keypad. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for both professional and casual urban environments.
description: A black HP laptop with a green backlit keyboard, open screen displaying Intel promotional content, and several informational placards and stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with Intel promotional content, green backlit keyboard, and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, side placards, and partial visibility of the keyboard and stickers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the green HP logo on the lid and the attached informational placards around the screen.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's profile, keyboard, stickers, and placards from a different angle.
attribute_brand_logo: A green HP logo is centered on the back of the display lid, circular in shape with stylized lowercase 'hp' letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a promotional image with a person and Intel branding.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no visible numeric keypad, and green backlighting.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers are present on the right palm rest area: one rectangular with technical details and one square Intel Core i5 badge.
